raw_consumer_statement:
The following accounts are being reported with late payments, despite all payments being made on time, in full, and on the respective due dates : The late fees charged by Barclays Bank/GAP ( XXXX ) and the reporting of late payments in my consumer report are false and misleading. These errors have caused significant damage to my reputation, character, and overall quality of life, as well as affected my family.
